quoteFirst: WHO sayeth and confesseth, that he, this examinant, on Monday was seventh night,
quoteTime: about two of the clock in the afternoon
quoteLast: , this examinant was walking in a Close, betwixt Cawood and Wistow; and he farther sayeth, that he threw his said wife into the pond, where she was drowned, and the day following, towards the evening, got a hay-spade at a hay-stake in the said Close, and made a grave beside the said pond, and buried her.
